---
title: "Part 1：深度学习基础"
author: Brench
date: 2026-05-08
date-modified: today
page-layout: full
comments: false

listing:
  contents:
    - "../chapter01-introduction/*.qmd"
    - "../chatper02-pytorch-introduction/*.qmd"
  sort: title asc
  type: table
  fields: [title, author, date]
  date-format: iso

open-graph:
  title: part1-deep-learning-foundations
  description: "Part 1: 深度学习基础"
---
